# Handoffs - index (generated, do not edit)

Thin index over every session handoff in this directory, generated by
[`scripts/gen-handoff-index.sh`](../scripts/gen-handoff-index.sh). Handoffs are session
history: newest-first below, and the newest is the current resume point. Files are
append-only and stay in place (other docs link them by path) - this index never moves
or renames a handoff. Regenerate with `scripts/gen-handoff-index.sh` after adding one;
CI ([`.github/workflows/freshness.yml`](../.github/workflows/freshness.yml)) fails a push
if this file is out of date.
